# Vue OTP Pro

> Beautiful, customizable OTP input component for Vue 3

Vue OTP Pro is a drop-in OTP (One-Time Password) input component for Vue 3 applications. It provides 11 built-in themes, 5 color variants, smooth animations, and full accessibility out of the box.

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://vue-otp-pro.dev/guide/getting-started): Installation and quick start
- [Props & Events](https://vue-otp-pro.dev/guide/props): Complete API reference
- [Theming](https://vue-otp-pro.dev/guide/theming): 11 themes, CSS custom properties, dark mode
- [Accessibility](https://vue-otp-pro.dev/guide/accessibility): ARIA, keyboard navigation, mobile support
- [Examples](https://vue-otp-pro.dev/examples/): Interactive playground and live demos
- [LLM Full Reference](https://vue-otp-pro.dev/llms-full.txt): Complete API for AI agents
